extension.summary: TMDb Helfer
TMDb Helper
TMDb 助手
extension.description: TMDb Helper liefert Details über Filme, Fernsehsendungen und Schauspieler aus TMDb. Benutzer können auf eine Vielzahl von Listen aus TMDb TVDb MDbList und Trakt zugreifen.
TMDb Helper provides details about movies, tvshows and actors from TMDb. Users can access a variety of lists from TMDb TVDb MDbList and Trakt.
TMDb Helper dostarcza szczegółowych informacji o filmach, serialach i aktorach z serwisu TMDb. Użytkownicy mają dostęp do szeregu list z serwisów TMDb, TVDb, MDbList i Trakt.
TMDb Helper tillhandahåller information om filmer, tv-serier och skådespelare från TMDb. Användare kan få tillgång till en mängd olika listor från TMDb, TVDb, MDbList och Trakt.
TMDb 助手从 TMDb（影视数据库） 获取电影、电视剧及演员的详细信息。用户可访问来自 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList 和 Trakt 的各类影视列表。
extension.disclaimer: Daten bereitgestellt von TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV und Trakt. Einige der Informationen werden von TheTVDB.com bereitgestellt. Bitte erwäge sie zu unterstützen. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data provided by TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV and Trakt. Some of the information is provided by TheTVDB.com. Please consider supporting them. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Dane dostarczane przez TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV i Trakt. Niektóre informacje pochodzą z serwisu TheTVDB.com. Prosimy o rozważenie wsparcia tych serwisów. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data tillhandahållen av TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV och Trakt. En del av informationen tillhandahålls av TheTVDB.com. Stöd dem gärna. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
数据由 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList、OMDb、FanartTV 和 Trakt 提供。部分信息由 TheTVDB.com 提供，建议您支持他们。订阅链接：https://thetvdb.com/subscribe

extension.summary: jurialmunkey Alpha Repository
extension.description: A repository for the required TMDb Helper.

addon.name: Movie Genre Icons - Filmstrip HD - BW

extension.summary: Filmstrip black and white movie genre icons in high resolution
extension.description: Filmstrip black and white movie genre icons created by bsoriano. Template by Mr. V, based on the original concept by frodo18.

addon.name: Movie Genre Icons - Filmstrip HD - coloured

extension.summary: Filmstrip coloured movie genre icons in high resolution
extension.description: Filmstrip colored movie genre icons created by bsoriano. Template by Mr. V, based on the original concept by frodo18.

extension.summary: Image resources and extras for the Madnox skin
extension.description: This addon contains the extra backgrounds, cdart, icons, and genres required by the Madnox skin. It has been separated to optimize the main skin installation size.
extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0

item.label: AD: $ADDON[script.artwork.dump 32410]
item.visible: Skin.HasSetting(enablecontext:script.artwork.dump) + [String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBTYPE, movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBTYPE, set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBTYPE, tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBTYPE, episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBTYPE, musicvideo)]

extension.summary: Automatically download artwork for your media.
extension.description: Artwork Dump automatically downloads artwork for media in your video and music libraries into your media file system. It only downloads artwork already added to your libraries.
extension.news:
v0.4.1 (2025-04-12) - fix: error when manually pre-caching images
v0.4.0 (2025-03-23) - feature: scan new music exactly by "date new" and "date modified" - feature: add option to scan new videos by "date added" - feature: add option to use or replace existing file when a new URL is in the library - fix: only show titles for updated media items in progress display

extension.summary: Python wrapper for setInfo on Nexus InfoTags
extension.description: Python wrapper for setInfo on Nexus InfoTags
Common code required by TMDbHelper and other related jurialmunkey add-ons
TMDb 助手及其他相关 jurialmunkey 插件所需的通用代码

extension.summary: Movie theater preshow experience
extension.description: Create a completely customizable movie preshow containing trailers, trivia, video bumpers or slideshows for your home theater.

extension.summary: Helper script for the Madnox skin providing extended logic and features.
extension.description: Provides background logic, script routing, and enhanced functionality required by the Madnox skin.
extension.summary: Helper script for the Madnox skin providing extended logic and features.
extension.description: Provides background logic, script routing, and enhanced functionality required by the Madnox skin.
extension.summary: برنامج مساعد لواجهة Madnox يوفر وظائف إضافية للجلد.
extension.description: يوفر منطقًا ووظائف خلفية ضرورية لعمل واجهة Madnox بشكل كامل.
extension.summary: Hilfsskript für den Madnox‑Skin, das zusätzliche Logik und Funktionen bereitstellt.
extension.description: Stellt Hintergrundlogik, Skriptrouting und erweiterte Funktionen für den Madnox‑Skin bereit.
extension.summary: Script auxiliar para el skin Madnox que ofrece funciones y lógica adicionales.
extension.description: Proporciona lógica interna, enrutamiento de scripts y funciones avanzadas necesarias para el skin Madnox.
extension.summary: Script d’assistance pour le skin Madnox, ajoutant des fonctions et une logique étendue.
extension.description: Fournit la logique interne, le routage des scripts et les fonctionnalités avancées nécessaires au skin Madnox.
extension.summary: Hjelpeskript for Madnox‑skallet som gir ekstra funksjoner og logikk.
extension.description: Gir bakgrunnslogikk, skriptruting og utvidede funksjoner som Madnox‑skallet krever.
extension.summary: Script auxiliar para o tema Madnox, oferecendo lógica e recursos adicionais.
extension.description: Fornece lógica interna, roteamento de scripts e funcionalidades avançadas necessárias para o tema Madnox.
extension.summary: Hjälpskript för Madnox‑skalet som tillhandahåller extra funktioner och logik.
extension.description: Ger bakgrundslogik, skriptrouting och avancerade funktioner som behövs för Madnox‑skalet.
extension.summary: Допоміжний скрипт для оформлення Madnox, що забезпечує додаткову логіку та функції.
extension.description: Надає внутрішню логіку, маршрутизацію скриптів та розширені можливості, необхідні для оформлення Madnox.

extension.summary: Access Wikipedia via Kodi
extension.description: Access Wikipedia via Kodi

extension.summary: Сваля и възпроизвежда мелодиите от вашите филми и сериали
Obté i reproduieix els temes de les seves pel·lícules i sèries de televisió
Hent og afspil dine Film og TV-show Temaer.
Hole und spiele die Titelmelodie beim Browsen der TV-Shows
Λήψη και αναπαραγωγή μουσικών θεμάτων (TvTunes) των τηλεοπτικών σας σειρών
Play your soundtrack or video themes whilst browsing your library
Descarga y reproduce las bandas sonoras de las series de tu biblioteca
Récupérez et écoutez les génériques des séries TV
Récupérer et lire vos thèmes de bandes sonores tout en parcourant votre vidéothèque
Obter e reproducir a música das súas Series de TV
הורדה וניגון נעימות של סרטים וסדרות בעת עיון בספריה
Nabavite i reproducirajte temu vašeg omiljenog filma i TV serije prilikom pregledavanja svoje videoteke
Ottieni ed esegui i temi musicali delle tue Serie tV
영화와 TV 쇼의 테마 음악을 가져와서 재생합니다
gauti ir atkurti jūsų filmų ir tv laidų temas
Verkrijg en speel je nummer of video thema`s tijdens zoeken in jouw bibliotheek
Hent og spill av kjenningsmelodier mens du blar gjennom biblioteket
Pobieraj i odtwarzaj ścieżki dźwiękowe lub motywy wideo podczas przeglądania biblioteki
Obtenha e reproduza as músicas dos seus filmes e séries de TV.
Obtenha e reproduza o tema musical das suas séries de TV
Hämtar och spelar dina TV-serier-teman
extension.description: Скриптът ще Ви помогне да се сдобиете с мелодии от филми и сериали. Когато преглеждате инф. за даден филм или епизодите от даден сериал, съответната мелодия ще се възпроизвежда автоматично. За целта е необходимо да ползвате съвместим облик.

Aquest script t'ajudarà a cercar la banda sonora de les teves pel·lícules i sèries de televisió en www.televisiontunes.com Les guardarà en un fitxer theme[0-9].mp3 a la carpeta dels vídeos i seran reproduïdes mentre navegues per la teva col·lecció de vídeos, quant entris a la carpeta d'una sèrie o a la pantalla d'informació de vídeo. (Necessites una pell compatible per a aquesta funcionalitat)

Scriptet vil hjælpe dig med at hente temaer til dit film og serie bibliotek fra www.televisiontunes.com. Den gemmer dem som theme[0-9].mp3 i hver af dine videomapper, så de vil blive spillet mens du gennemser dit videobibliotek når du går ind i seriemappen eller Video Information (Dit skin skal være kompatibel med denne feature)

Dieses Skript unterstützt das Laden, Organisieren und Abspielen von Titelmelodien deiner Filme und TV-Serien. Diese werden dann abgespielt, wenn du in deiner Datenbank oder den Video-Ordnern stöberst (benötigt einen kompatiblen Skin)

Αυτό το script θα σας βοηθήσει να κατεβάσετε μουσικά θέματα των τηλεοπτικών σας σειρών από το www.televisiontunes.com, θα τα αποθηκεύει σε αρχεία μορφής theme.mp3 στο φάκελο της εκάστοτε σειράς, και θα τα αναπαράγει κατά την περιήγησή σας στη συλλογή τηλ. σειρών σας (απαιτείται να υποστηρίζεται από το κέλυφός σας)
TvTunes will play themes whilst browsing your Kodi library.

Este script te ayudará a buscar las bandas sonoras de tus películas y series de www.televisiontunes.com y guardará un fichero theme.mp3 en el directorio de tu serie y será reproducido mientras navegas dentro de la carpeta de la serie. (Necesitas una skin compatible para esta funcionalidad)

Ce script aidera à télécharger les génériques de série depuis www.televisiontunes.com. Il les enregistrera dans un fichier theme.mp3 dans les dossiers des séries, et ils seront ensuite joués à l'entrée dans la série correspondante (cette fonctionnalité requiert un thème compatible)
TVTunes est équipé de fonctions puissantes qui permettent la récupération, l'organisation et la lecture de thèmes tout en parcourant votre vidéothèque Kodi.

Este script axudaralle a obter dende www.televisiontunes.com o tema da súa biblioteca de series, gardándoo no ficheiro theme.mp3 por cada cartafol da biblioteca entón reproduciranse ao entrar nos diferentes cartafoles ao navegar pola biblioteca (precisa de que o seu tema sexa compatíbel con esta carácteristica)

סקריפט זה יעזור לך להשיג שירי נושא לספריות הסרטים והסדרות שלך מ-www.televisiontunes.com, ישמור אותם בקובץ בשם theme[0-9].mp3 בכל אחת מתיקיות הוידאו שלך והם ינוגנו בעת עיון בספריית הוידאו כאשר תיכנס לספריית סדרה או במסך מידע וידאו (נדרשת תאימות המעטפת עבור יכולת זו)

TvTunes je opremljen s moćnim značajkama koje omogućavaju nabavljanje, organizaciju i reproduciranje glazbenih tema dok vi pregledavate vašu Kodi videoteku, kada se koristi zajedno s kompatibilnom presvlakom.

Questo script ti aiuterà ad ottenere il tema delle serie tv presenti nella tua libreria da www.televisiontunes.com, li salverà nel file theme.mp3 in ogni cartella delle tue serie così quando sfoglierai la serie tv il tema sarà eseguito (il tuo skin deve essere compatibile)
라이브러리의 영화와 TV 쇼 테마 음악을 www.televisiontunes.com 에서 가져와서 theme[0-9].mp3 형식으로 비디오 폴더에 저장합니다. TV 쇼 폴더나 비디오 정보 화면으로 들어가면 비디오 라이브러리를 탐색하는 동안 주제음악이 재생됩니다. (이 기능 사용하려면 스킨에서 지원하여야 합니다.)

Šis skriptas jums padės temas jūsų filmų ir tv laidų temas iš www.televisiontunes.com. Jos bus išsaugotos theme[0-9].mp3 faile, kiekviename jūsų vaizdo aplanke ir bus atkurtos, naršant vaizdo bibliotekoje, pasirinkus TV laidos aplanką arba vaizdo informacijos langą (teminė išvaizda turi būti suderinama su šia funkcija)

Dit script zoekt thema`s van TV series in jouw TV seriebibliotheek op www.televisiontunes.com en slaat ze op in thema[0-9].mp3 bestand in elke TV serie map. Ze worden afgespeeld wanneer je de TV serie in bibliotheek modus bekijkt of Video-informatiescherm (Het gebruikte ontwerp moet wel compatibel zijn met dit script)
TvTunes er velutrustet med kraftige funksjoner som gjør det mulig hente, organisere og spille av kjenningsmelodier mens du blar igjennom Kodi biblioteket.
Dodatek TvTunes wyposażono w potężny zestaw funkcji umożliwiający pobieranie, organizowanie i odtwarzanie motywów muzycznych podczas przeglądania biblioteki Kodi.

Com este addon, poderá obter as músicas dos filmes e séries TV na sua biblioteca a partir de televisiontunes.com. Serão guardadas em ficheiros theme[0-9].mp3 dentro das pastas de vídeo e serão reproduzidas durante a navegação na biblioteca de vídeo, quando entrar dentro da pasta de Séries TV ou no ecrã de Informação de Vídeo (é necessário um tema compatível).

Este script ajudará você a obter o tema da sua coleção de séries de TV de www.televisiontunes.com, que serão salvos em um arquivo theme.mp3 em cada uma das pastas de suas séries e serão reproduzidos sempre que você acessar uma série na sua coleção (a skin precisa ser compatível com este recurso)

Detta skript hjälper dig att hitta teman till ditt tv-seriebibliotek från www.televisiontunes.com som sparas i theme.mp3 filer i varje tv-seriemapp som sedan spelas när du öppnar tv-seriemappen (ditt skal måste vara kompatibelt för detta)
extension.news: [B][COLOR=FF2CD13B]v2.1.4[/COLOR][/B] - Release date March 1, 2026[CR] [B][COLOR=FFFFA500]FIX[/COLOR][/B] • Video theme bug fixed by mikeSiLVO.

extension.summary: مظهر غني بالميزات وقابل للتخصيص بالكامل
Ein funktionsreiches und vollständig anpassbares Skin
A feature rich and fully customizable skin
A feature rich and fully customizable skin
Una piel rica en funciones y totalmente personalizable
Un thème riche en fonctionnalités et entièrement personnalisable
Et funksjonsrikt og fullt tilpassbart skall
Um tema rico em recursos e totalmente personalizável
Ett funktionsrikt och helt anpassningsbart skal
Шкіра з багатими функціями та повним налаштуванням
extension.description: Madnox يتميز بجمال بصري وخيارات تخصيص متعددة. هناك العديد من طرق العرض والخيارات لعرض الوسائط بالطريقة التي تريدها. جميع طرق العرض قابلة للتخصيص بالكامل. يمكنك تغيير المظهر باستخدام أنماط وسمات وخيارات مختلفة.

Madnox steht für visuelle Attraktivität und Anpassbarkeit. Es gibt viele Ansichten und Optionen, um Ihre Medien ganz nach Wunsch zu präsentieren. Alle Ansichten sind vollständig anpassbar. Sie können das Erscheinungsbild mit verschiedenen Stilen, Themen und Optionen verändern.

Madnox stands for eye candy and customization. There are many different views and options to present your media in the way you want it. All views are fully customizable. You can change the look with different styles, themes and options.

Madnox stands for eye candy and customization. There are many different views and options to present your media in the way you want it. All views are fully customizable. You can change the look with different styles, themes and options.

Madnox destaca por su atractivo visual y personalización. Hay muchas vistas y opciones para mostrar tu contenido como prefieras. Todas las vistas son completamente personalizables. Puedes cambiar el aspecto con diferentes estilos, temas y opciones.

Madnox se distingue par son esthétique et sa personnalisation. De nombreuses vues et options permettent de présenter vos médias comme vous le souhaitez. Toutes les vues sont entièrement personnalisables. Vous pouvez modifier l’apparence avec différents styles, thèmes et options.

Madnox står for visuell appell og tilpasning. Det finnes mange visninger og alternativer for å presentere mediene dine slik du ønsker. Alle visninger kan tilpasses fullt ut. Du kan endre utseendet med ulike stiler, temaer og alternativer.

Madnox é sinônimo de visual atrativo e personalização. Há muitas visualizações e opções para apresentar sua mídia como quiser. Todas as visualizações são totalmente personalizáveis. Você pode alterar o visual com diferentes estilos, temas e opções.

Madnox står för ögongodis och anpassning. Det finns många olika vyer och alternativ för att visa ditt innehåll på det sätt du vill. Alla vyer är helt anpassningsbara. Du kan ändra utseendet med olika stilar, teman och alternativ.

Madnox — це візуальна привабливість і налаштування. Існує багато варіантів перегляду та опцій для представлення медіа так, як вам подобається. Усі перегляди повністю налаштовуються. Ви можете змінити вигляд за допомогою стилів, тем і параметрів.
extension.disclaimer: Madnox هو خليفة Aeon Madnox من Mike_Doc وschimi2k وMeowMoo. إنه مظهر يعتمد على تصميم Aeon من djh_ وAeon Nox 4 من BigNoid وphil65. شكر خاص لـ Mr. V. جميع الحقوق محفوظة لمصممي هذه المظاهر والتعديلات.

Madnox ist der Nachfolger von Aeon Madnox von Mike_Doc, schimi2k und MeowMoo. Es basiert auf dem Design von Aeon von djh_ und Aeon Nox 4 von BigNoid und phil65. Besonderer Dank an Mr. V. Alle Credits gehen an die Entwickler dieser Skins und Mods.

Madnox is the successor to Aeon Madnox by Mike_Doc, schimi2k and MeowMoo. It is a skin based on the design of Aeon by djh_ and Aeon Nox 4 by BigNoid and phil65. Special thanks to Mr. V. All credits to the makers of these skins and mods.

Madnox is the successor to Aeon Madnox by Mike_Doc, schimi2k and MeowMoo. It is a skin based on the design of Aeon by djh_ and Aeon Nox 4 by BigNoid and phil65. Special thanks to Mr. V. All credits to the makers of these skins and mods.

Madnox es el sucesor de Aeon Madnox creado por Mike_Doc, schimi2k y MeowMoo. Es un skin basado en el diseño de Aeon de djh_ y Aeon Nox 4 de BigNoid y phil65. Agradecimientos especiales a Mr. V. Todos los créditos a los creadores de estos skins y modificaciones.

Madnox est le successeur d’Aeon Madnox par Mike_Doc, schimi2k et MeowMoo. Il s’inspire du design d’Aeon par djh_ et d’Aeon Nox 4 par BigNoid et phil65. Remerciements spéciaux à Mr. V. Tous les crédits vont aux créateurs de ces skins et mods.

Madnox er etterfølgeren til Aeon Madnox av Mike_Doc, schimi2k og MeowMoo. Skallet er basert på designet til Aeon av djh_ og Aeon Nox 4 av BigNoid og phil65. Spesiell takk til Mr. V. All ære til skaperne av disse skallene og modifikasjonene.

Madnox é o sucessor do Aeon Madnox criado por Mike_Doc, schimi2k e MeowMoo. É um tema baseado no design do Aeon de djh_ e Aeon Nox 4 de BigNoid e phil65. Agradecimentos especiais ao Mr. V. Todos os créditos aos criadores desses temas e modificações.

Madnox är efterföljaren till Aeon Madnox av Mike_Doc, schimi2k och MeowMoo. Det är ett skal baserat på designen av Aeon av djh_ och Aeon Nox 4 av BigNoid och phil65. Särskilt tack till Mr. V. All ära till skaparna av dessa skal och moddar.

Madnox — це наступник Aeon Madnox від Mike_Doc, schimi2k та MeowMoo. Це шкіра, заснована на дизайні Aeon від djh_ та Aeon Nox 4 від BigNoid і phil65. Особлива подяка Mr. V. Всі заслуги — авторам цих оформлень і модифікацій.
extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0
extension.news:
v.22.10.01 ** Front end ** -Display/Hide main context menu options -1st run startup will set all the default skin values if not present, ensures all controls are initialized -Widget QOL updates, left navigations updates main page as one would expect -Music section completely rebuilt and refactored, better artwork rendering, layout, matches video/movie/tv layouts -Refactored infodialogs to be compartmentalized for faster loading, expansion, future growth -Added star ratings with color selection to the movie info videoinfo line -Revamped Media Flags to cover all the user cases, should be a major improvement -Wikipedia user color control to the backing overlay -Favorites overhauled with new HUD and active resizing -Increased widgets on home screen from 6 to 20 -Widgets now have two modes, Carousel (original operation) & Grid mode (new) -Multiple "mini" system widgets to select from include CPU, GPU, Memory and others. -Music: Converted scaling for fanart from scale to keep (User feedback: elve) -Built new fallback process when blur is turned off with adjustable dimming -Blur can be fanart driven with gaussian, mixed with color, or custom color picker with alpha selected -Complete refactor of Movie/TV show sub dialog pages -Added custom accent color control to VideoOSD (User feedback: crazyturk) -Repaired skin shortcuts for "In-Progress" movies in widgets and ALL views -Added "In-Progress" bar overlay to all views when viewed -Custom color selection of "In-Progress" bar globally in all views -New native "jump to letter" built into Kodi decoupled from Embuary Helper -Added icons to info metadata fields for movie/TV shows rows with disable -Added Wikipedia addon feature in detailed views -New skin initializer for missing startup settings installer on 1st run -Added factory restore feature resetting to 1st run out of the box values -Added auto trailer viewer on library hover Automatic trailer video preview with fanart fill selectable -Video codec format type selection for media flags selection as 4K or 2160p (User feedback: lynxstrike) -Rebuilt cinema mode and enhanced usability to include user full features (bumpers, ratings, mpaa) -Cinema mode diagnostics with verification of path and reconstruction capability to ensure smooth user experience -Integrating PreShow Experience for advanced Cinema Mode, allows for simple and advanced cinema experience (WIP) -Reformatted and updated color media flags -Synced/Updated/Created default greyscale flags assets to match color media flags -Moved startup logo spinner down and off large logo -Updated missing filmstrip genre image files for completeness -Fixed views with broken 2 and 4 thumbs to use selected fanart, fully repaired -Jump to letter: When in "numbers", # is replaced by actual number of movie. Example 300 > 3 is showin in bar instead of # -Poster is no longer the domanent image in views, if slider panel is selected like similar, it will display active hovered item until released
** Admin (Back end) ** -Conversion to TMDb Helper from Embuary helper completed -Built missing code for blurring fanart images in all areas via TMDb helper -Refactored Skin Shortcuts to remove Embuary Helper to TMDb helper link template constructors -Custom Video Codec media flags override selector, removes skin hacking, resettable (WIP) -Restructuring of media flags detection (WIP) -Startup video intro controls: None, Skin built-in, Custom selectable with preview on hover -Fixed media flags admin selector to use colored flags where screen would reset and blank out, fully repaired -Fixed shifting color swatches shifting and showing placeholder text when disable is active -Created "in-process" control color selection and enable control -Controls for metadata in movies and tv shows to enable in-row icons -Reset all skin options to default control
** General All ** -2/16/2026 Madnox now has its own dedicated skin helper to consolidate all scripts and satisfy Kodi's requirements of free running scripts -2/16/2026 1st run will write all required settings (version controlled) for added dev work without prompting preventing odd behavior until restart & continued use to initialize missing settings -Multiple issues resolved (syntax, spelling, missing calls) -Removed startup script causing forced icon view overriding all user selection (Dev leftover) -Comprehensive removal of as many hardcoded strings into localization and all files fully translated -Startup bugs and errors resolved -Intro startup videos added on Kodi start.
v.22.02.06 -Added ability to turn off Madnox startup logo inside admin furniture panel -Turned off main menu forced icons settings (dev testing left active by mistake in script) v.22.02.05 -Fixed widgets on main screen to use custom color picker -Subtitle color parameters can now be adjusted within the skin using custom color picker -Remove experimental replacement dev flag until next iteration -Minor code cleanup and refactoring v.22.02.04 -Fixed navigation corrections to TMDb Helper page and Movie/TV Show buttons/panels. v.22.02.03 -Removed duplicate language strings -Fixed metadata slider and countdown timer inverted logic -Add Norwegian language strings v.22.02.02 -Added navigation corrections to TMDb Helper page -Adjust default icon color include variable to correct for "icon error" where error is not present. v.22.02.01 -* Global *- -Minor version increase to 21.02.01. -(WIP) (Long Term) - Begin migration from Embuary Helper to TMDb Helper. Not a trivial change, maintained as much of the physical workflow as possible, some minor changes have been made and cannot be reverted to old methods, adoption should be easily understood. -Restructured Information dialog to support Person/Bio info into same dialog structure. -Multiple additions to Meta data fields providing more online and local data media labels. -Choice of large or small Madnox logo on startup. -Added Left/Right arrows for metadata when value is greater than 8 items for visual cue. -User adjustable time interval for Left/Right arrow slide (i.e. how often it switches if greater than 8 items). -Added countdown timer to display Left/Right switching duration and switch point (visual cue). -Added icons to various dialogs like "effects" for snow/leaves to visually display icon in dialog selection. -Added Madnox logo to all dialog popups. -Updated multiple strings to add uniqueness and better user experience diverging from cookie cutter phrases. -Added Recommendations panel to TMDb display dialog. -Added additional icons, feedback, graphical elements based on restructured layout to TMDb Infopage. -Fixed aspect ratio for "Videos" and removed limit of 2 in TMDb Infopage. -Aspect Ratio and Resolution icons colors can be set globally in the admin panel (10 options). -Entirely retooled color picker dialog replacing Kodi's built-in version allowing slider control of RGBA. -Local script logging enable/disable, defaults to off to prevent bloating KODI log file for debugging. -Automatic download of baseline image collections (weather, studio etc.), can be removed or replaced as needed. Rationale: provide better start point of visuals since most users can be overwhelmed on what they should or should not use based on taste/workflow. Default download and enable will provide a better user experience and will not affect lower tier hardware as it requires minimal space requirements. -Removed errant label in system info right side panel -Multiple mini scripts to replicate Embuary Helper to maintain core functionality, including play all, color picker, and new feature adds. -Added Skin Variables addons to add additional capability to replicate local related type movies and future capability updates and features.
-* Biography *- -Added death date (if applicable). -Updated Infoline with additional icons below main title. -Added feedback on rollover of panel data across all buttons. -Restructured page for better flow. -Shows local discart if movies are in focus and rollover of local movie with artwork is present.
-* Movies *- -Added date to main title in Information view. -Added all relevant meta tags in grid based on TMDb Helpers tag structure retrieval. -Updated Infoline and icons below main title with several revised icons. -Several string updates for uniformity between dialogs -Increased icon sizes in Infoline.
-* TV Shows *- -Added color control to TV Show returning/air date from grey to color picker selection with persistence. -Updated icons for returning, not returning. -Added date to main title in Information view. -Added all relevant meta tags in grid based on TMDb Helpers tag structure retrieval. -Updated Infoline and icons below main title with several revised icons. -Increased icon sizes in Infoline.
-* Music *- -Added year to Now Playing after album (if present). -Added Aspect Ratio adjust to Admin panel to control Fanart background. -Added switch to Now Playing script view when Play All is activated. -(WIP) - Looking at reworking ID tag area.
